tests.title: Initial pseudo-state lands in Boot
tests.action: Construct a fresh app::StateMachine instance
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Boot; no action invoked

tests.title: Boot -> Start on EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_BOOT_DONE with guard_init_ok returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and app_init_success() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Construct fresh StateMachine

tests.title: Boot -> Error on EV_ERROR [ble_init_failed]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR with guard_ble_init_failed returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error_ble() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Construct fresh StateMachine

tests.title: Boot -> Halted on EV_ERROR [hw_init_failed]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR with guard_hw_init_failed returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Halted and app_on_error_hw() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Construct fresh StateMachine

tests.title: Start -> PeerSearch on EV_PLAY
tests.action: Dispatch EV_PLAY
tests.expected_result: current() == State::PeerSearch and on_play_button() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: Start -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Start by dispatching EV_BOOT_DONE [init_ok] from Boot

tests.title: PeerSearch -> RoleNegotiating on EV_PEER_FOUND
tests.action: Dispatch EV_PEER_FOUND
tests.expected_result: current() == State::RoleNegotiating and on_peer_found() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach PeerSearch by dispatching EV_PLAY from Start

tests.title: PeerSearch -> SinglePlayerFallback on EV_PEER_TIMEOUT
tests.action: Dispatch EV_PEER_TIMEOUT
tests.expected_result: current() == State::SinglePlayerFallback and on_discovery_timeout() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach PeerSearch by dispatching EV_PLAY from Start

tests.title: PeerSearch -> Start on EV_CANCEL
tests.action: Dispatch EV_CANCEL
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and on_cancel_button() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach PeerSearch by dispatching EV_PLAY from Start

tests.title: PeerSearch -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach PeerSearch by dispatching EV_PLAY from Start

tests.title: RoleNegotiating -> Connecting on EV_ROLE_RESOLVED [role_host]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ROLE_RESOLVED with guard_role_host returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Connecting and start_advertising_host() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach RoleNegotiating by dispatching EV_PEER_FOUND from PeerSearch

tests.title: RoleNegotiating -> Connecting on EV_ROLE_RESOLVED [role_join]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ROLE_RESOLVED with guard_role_join returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Connecting and start_scanning_join() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach RoleNegotiating by dispatching EV_PEER_FOUND from PeerSearch

tests.title: RoleNegotiating -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach RoleNegotiating by dispatching EV_PEER_FOUND from PeerSearch

tests.title: Connecting -> Gameplay on EV_CONNECTED
tests.action: Dispatch EV_CONNECTED
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_peer_connected() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Connecting by dispatching EV_ROLE_RESOLVED [role_host|role_join] from RoleNegotiating

tests.title: Connecting -> Disconnected on EV_DISCONNECTED
tests.action: Dispatch EV_DISCONNECTED
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Disconnected and on_peer_disconnected() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Connecting by dispatching EV_ROLE_RESOLVED [role_host|role_join] from RoleNegotiating

tests.title: Connecting -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Connecting by dispatching EV_ROLE_RESOLVED [role_host|role_join] from RoleNegotiating

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_ROCK [peer_move_received]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_ROCK with guard_peer_move_received returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_local_move_rock_complete() was invoked

tests.expected_result: current() == State::Gameplay and on_local_move_rock_pending() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Gameplay by dispatching EV_CONNECTED from Connecting

tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked

tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_ROCK
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_singleplayer_move_rock() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach SinglePlayerFallback by dispatching EV_PEER_TIMEOUT from PeerSearch

tests.title: SinglePlayerFallback -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_PAPER
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_PAPER
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_singleplayer_move_paper() was invoked

tests.title: SinglePlayerFallback -> Evaluating on EV_MOVE_SCISSORS
tests.action: Dispatch EV_MOVE_SCISSORS
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Evaluating and on_singleplayer_move_scissors() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach SinglePlayerFallback by dispatching EV_PEER_TIMEOUT from PeerSearch

tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked

tests.action: Dispatch EV_EVALUATE
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Result and evaluate_and_show_result() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Evaluating by dispatching a move event from Gameplay or SinglePlayerFallback

tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked

tests.reset_action: Reach Disconnected by dispatching EV_DISCONNECTED from Connecting, Gameplay, or Result

tests.title: Disconnected -> Error on EV_ERROR
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Error and app_on_error() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Disconnected by dispatching EV_DISCONNECTED from Connecting, Gameplay, or Result

tests.title: Error -> Start on EV_RETRY
tests.action: Dispatch EV_RETRY
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Start and reset_and_return_start() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Error by dispatching EV_ERROR from any state

tests.title: Error -> Halted on EV_ERROR [fatal]
tests.action: Dispatch EV_ERROR with guard_fatal returning true
tests.expected_result: current() == State::Halted and app_on_error_fatal() was invoked
tests.reset_action: Reach Error by dispatching EV_ERROR from any state

tests.title: Boot succeeds and firmware reaches Start state in Wokwi
tests.action: Power on/reset the device in Wokwi simulation
tests.expected_result: Serial output contains setup-complete and Start-state markers; no fatal error logged

tests.title: Target boot succeeds and reaches Start screen
tests.action: Power on the CYD2USB v3 board
tests.expected_result: Board initializes without fatal errors, Start screen is rendered, serial logs setup done

tests.title: Boot -> Error when BLE initialization fails on target
tests.action: Power on with BLE stack initialization blocked or misconfigured
tests.expected_result: Error screen is shown and serial logs a BLE-specific init failure

tests.title: PeerSearch -> SinglePlayerFallback after discovery timeout
tests.action: Wait 10 seconds without discovering a BLE peer
tests.expected_result: Screen switches to gameplay mode, serial reports single-player mode and Gameplay state
tests.reset_action: From Start screen, tap Play to enter PeerSearch

tests.title: PeerSearch -> RoleNegotiating when a peer is discovered
tests.action: Have a second CYD2USB device in PeerSearch within BLE range
tests.expected_result: Peer is discovered, role negotiation begins, serial logs PEER_FOUND and ROLE assignment
tests.reset_action: On DUT, tap Play to enter PeerSearch; ensure peer device is also searching

tests.title: RoleNegotiating -> Connecting as Host (lower MAC)
tests.action: Peer discovered and local public BLE MAC is lower than peer MAC
tests.expected_result: Device assumes Host role and starts advertising, serial logs ROLE: HOST and STATE: Connecting

tests.title: RoleNegotiating -> Connecting as Join (higher MAC)
tests.action: Peer discovered and local public BLE MAC is higher than peer MAC
tests.expected_result: Device assumes Join role and starts scanning/connecting, serial logs ROLE: JOIN and STATE: Connecting

tests.title: Connecting -> Gameplay when BLE link is established
tests.action: Wait for the BLE connection and GATT service setup to complete
tests.expected_result: Screen switches to SCR_Gameplay in multiplayer mode, serial logs MODE: MULTI_PLAYER and STATE: Gameplay

tests.title: Connecting -> Disconnected when peer is lost before gameplay
tests.action: Power off or move the peer device out of range during connection setup
tests.expected_result: State changes to Disconnected and Start screen is shown, serial logs STATE: Disconnected

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating when peer move arrives after local move
tests.action: After the local player has chosen a move, have the peer send its move
tests.expected_result: Round is evaluated and screen transitions to SCR_Result, serial logs STATE: Evaluating then STATE: Result
tests.reset_action: Complete T07, then manually select a move on the DUT

tests.title: Gameplay -> Gameplay when peer move arrives before local move
tests.action: Have the peer send its move before the local player chooses
tests.expected_result: Peer move is stored, state remains Gameplay, status shows peer-chose indicator

tests.title: Gameplay -> Disconnected when peer disconnects mid-round
tests.action: Power off or move the peer device out of range during a round
tests.expected_result: State changes to Disconnected and Start screen is shown, serial logs STATE: Disconnected

tests.title: Evaluating -> Result after round evaluation
tests.action: Wait for the evaluate_and_show_result action to complete
tests.expected_result: Screen shows SCR_Result with both moves and outcome, serial logs STATE: Result and OUTCOME

tests.title: Result -> Disconnected when peer disconnects on result screen
tests.action: Power off or move the peer device out of range while SCR_Result is shown
tests.expected_result: State changes to Disconnected and Start screen is shown, serial logs STATE: Disconnected

tests.title: Start -> PeerSearch by tapping Play
tests.action: Tap the Play button on SCR_Start
tests.expected_result: Screen switches to SCR_PeerSearch, status label reads 'Searching for peer...'
tests.reset_action: Power cycle the device and wait for the Start screen

tests.title: PeerSearch -> Start by tapping Cancel
tests.action: Tap the Cancel button on SCR_PeerSearch
tests.expected_result: Screen returns to SCR_Start, discovery stops

tests.title: SinglePlayerFallback -> Evaluating by tapping a move
tests.action: Tap Rock, Paper, or Scissors on SCR_Gameplay in single-player fallback
tests.expected_result: Selected move is recorded, move buttons disable, opponent move is generated, screen transitions to SCR_Result
tests.reset_action: From Start, tap Play and wait 10 seconds without a peer to enter SinglePlayerFallback

tests.title: Gameplay -> Evaluating by tapping a move when peer move already received
tests.action: Tap Rock, Paper, or Scissors after the peer move has already arrived
tests.expected_result: Local move is recorded, round is evaluated, screen transitions to SCR_Result
tests.reset_action: Enter multiplayer Gameplay and have the peer send its move before choosing locally

tests.title: Result -> Gameplay by tapping Play Again (multiplayer)
tests.action: Tap the Play Again button after a multiplayer round
tests.expected_result: Round state resets, move buttons re-enable, screen returns to SCR_Gameplay in multiplayer mode
tests.reset_action: Complete a multiplayer round so SCR_Result is shown

tests.title: Result -> SinglePlayerFallback by tapping Play Again (single-player)
tests.action: Tap the Play Again button after a single-player round
tests.expected_result: Round state resets, move buttons re-enable, screen returns to SCR_Gameplay in single-player mode
tests.reset_action: Complete a single-player round so SCR_Result is shown

tests.title: Disconnected -> Start by tapping Retry
tests.action: Tap the Retry button on the disconnected/error screen
tests.expected_result: BLE is disconnected, game state resets, screen returns to SCR_Start
tests.reset_action: Reach Disconnected by losing the peer connection during a round

tests.title: Error -> Start by tapping Retry
tests.action: Tap the Retry button on SCR_Error
tests.expected_result: BLE is disconnected, game state resets, screen returns to SCR_Start
tests.reset_action: Reach Error by triggering a runtime error condition

untestable_transitions: BLE multiplayer peer discovery and role negotiation cannot be exercised in Wokwi because the ESP32 emulator does not emulate NimBLE reliably; NimBLEDevice::init() triggers a task watchdog abort. The Wokwi build defines WOKWI_SIMULATION and skips BLE stack init so the firmware boots to SCR_Start. BLE multiplayer is only available on physical CYD2USB hardware built with environment esp32-2432s028r_cyd2usb.
